text_original: the A.I. needs to be more smarter so it can handle multiple characters and improved memory so it can make the story run smoother.
text_zh: 人工智能需要变得更聪明，以便能够处理多个角色，并改进记忆力，使故事运行得更顺畅。
reply_original:
Thank you for your valuable feedback! We agree that smarter AI and multi-character handling would make stories much smoother. 

Good news: We recently launched a brand-new Memory Service upgrade to improve long-term retention! For better results now, try the Pin feature (long-press a message) to save key details.
reply_zh:
感谢您的宝贵反馈！我们非常认同更智能的 AI 和多角色处理能力会让故事体验更加流畅。

好消息是：我们最近推出了全新的记忆服务升级，以提升长期记忆能力！为了获得更好的效果，您现在可以尝试使用“置顶”功能（长按消息）来保存关键细节。
